title: Moderation Update: High-Severity Reports Reviewed
body:
We've reviewed today's high-severity reports:

✅ Actions Taken:
• Banned 'spam_wave_42' — phishing links posted across 6 channels
• Banned 'toxic_runner' — repeated targeted harassment against newcomers

✅ Dismissed:
• 'core_maintainer' — false positive from brigading; no violation occurred

⏳ Pending:
• 3 lower-severity reports remain open for review

Total: 3 reports closed, 2 accounts removed for community safety.
